items.definition_en: A paramedic gives emergency medical help outside of hospitals.
items.example_en: The paramedic arrived quickly to help the injured man.

items.definition_en: A pharmacist prepares and sells medicines in a pharmacy.
items.example_en: She asked the pharmacist about her prescription.

items.definition_en: A journalist writes news stories for newspapers or TV.
items.example_en: The journalist interviewed the mayor after the event.

items.definition_en: An electrician installs or repairs electrical systems.
items.example_en: We called an electrician to fix the broken lights.

items.definition_en: A mechanic repairs and maintains cars and machines.
items.example_en: The mechanic replaced the car's battery.

items.definition_en: A receptionist greets visitors and answers phones at a business.
items.example_en: The receptionist gave me a visitor badge.

items.definition_en: A plumber installs and fixes pipes and water systems.
items.example_en: They needed a plumber for the leaking kitchen sink.

items.definition_en: A carpenter makes and repairs things from wood.
items.example_en: A carpenter built the shelves in our living room.

items.definition_en: A software developer designs and creates computer programs.
items.example_en: He works as a software developer for a large company.

items.definition_en: A graphic designer creates images and layouts for print or web.
items.example_en: The graphic designer made a new logo for the shop.

items.definition_en: An accountant keeps and checks financial records for businesses.
items.example_en: Their accountant prepares the budget every year.

items.definition_en: An architect designs buildings and structures.
items.example_en: The architect showed us plans for the new school.

items.definition_en: A flight attendant helps and serves passengers on planes.
items.example_en: The flight attendant handed out snacks during the flight.

items.definition_en: A photographer takes professional photos as a job.
items.example_en: The photographer took pictures at the wedding.

items.definition_en: A translator changes written texts from one language to another.
items.example_en: The translator worked on the book for several months.

items.definition_en: A veterinarian is a doctor who takes care of animals.
items.example_en: The veterinarian helped our sick dog recover.

items.definition_en: A psychologist studies and helps with people's mental health.
items.example_en: She saw a psychologist to talk about her stress.

items.definition_en: A pilot is a person who flies an aircraft.
items.example_en: The pilot announced our arrival time over the speakers.

items.definition_en: A personal trainer helps people exercise and reach fitness goals.
items.example_en: My personal trainer designed a new workout plan for me.

items.definition_en: A social worker helps people with social and personal problems.
items.example_en: The social worker visited families to offer support.
